{% if show_language_switch %} {% set featherdoc_current_lang = "zh-CN" if pagename.startswith("zh-CN/") else "en" if pagename.startswith("en/") else "root" %} {% if featherdoc_current_lang == "zh-CN" %} {% set featherdoc_language_peer_page = "en/" + pagename[6:] %} {% set featherdoc_english_url = pathto(featherdoc_language_peer_page) if hasdoc(featherdoc_language_peer_page) else pathto("en/index") %} {% set featherdoc_chinese_url = pathto(pagename) %} {% elif featherdoc_current_lang == "en" %} {% set featherdoc_language_peer_page = "zh-CN/" + pagename[3:] %} {% set featherdoc_english_url = pathto(pagename) %} {% set featherdoc_chinese_url = pathto(featherdoc_language_peer_page) if hasdoc(featherdoc_language_peer_page) else pathto("zh-CN/index") %} {% else %} {% set featherdoc_english_url = pathto("en/index") %} {% set featherdoc_chinese_url = pathto("zh-CN/index") %} {% endif %}
{% endif %}
{% endmacro %} {% block linktags %} {%- if hasdoc('about') %} {%- endif %} {%- if hasdoc('genindex') %} {%- endif %} {%- if hasdoc('search') %} {%- endif %} {%- if hasdoc('copyright') %} {%- endif %} {% endblock %} {% block sidebarrel %}{% endblock %} {% block relbar1 %} {{ featherdoc_relbar(True) }} {% endblock %} {% block relbar2 %} {{ featherdoc_relbar(False) }} {% endblock %} {% block footer %}
